item.title: Version 1.7.1
item.description:
What's New in 1.7.1

  • Cleaner arc rendering — all gauge ring endpoints now use flat caps across the menu bar icon, popover, and widgets; no more rounded bubbles at the arc tips.
  • Inner ring hierarchy — the 7-day ring renders at reduced opacity so it stays visually subordinate to the 5h ring, even when both turn amber or red together.
  • No more false network banner — the "No network connection" alert no longer appears on launch when the network is available.
  • Widget sync — widgets now reload once after both services have fetched, so Codex and Claude Code are always shown together with consistent data.
  • Clearer reset label — "Resets Xh Ym" is now "5h resets Xh Ym" so it's immediately obvious which window the countdown tracks.
